coveredRequirements: Active planning warning uses yellow or red ANSI color codes for visibility
Active planning warning is enclosed in yellow borders or box-drawing characters
Active planning warning contains the planning session title
Active planning warning includes a recognisable label
Edge case: banner renders with color and borders even when title is empty
Edge case: no banner produced when planning session is inactive
Feature does not break existing planning state management (getPlanningState/applyPlanningState)
ambiguousRequirements: The plan does not specify which source module contains the banner rendering logic — we infer extensions/plan-feature.ts from Example 2
The plan does not specify exact color choice (yellow vs red) — tests accept either
The plan does not specify exact border style (box-drawing vs dashes) — tests accept both
Review and update existing test file — plan only says 'review and update' without specifying what changes; we align conventions with it
The feature behavior is documented in repo-grounded terms — this is a meta-level acceptance criterion about documentation, not a testable behavior
The plan cites affected modules or explicitly notes when no prior module exists — meta-level criterion about the plan document itself
Unconfirmed product changes beyond the requested feature — out-of-scope guard, not a testable behavior
(none) — clarified decisions section is empty, nothing to test
notes: Fix 1: Replaced hard import with dynamic import + try/catch so the suite doesn't crash on MODULE_NOT_FOUND. Each test checks importError and fails with a clear message.
Fix 2: Removed the ?? fallback chain entirely. Tests now use a single definitive function name: `formatPlanningBanner`. The implementation must export this exact name.

Fix 3: Tests are flagged as speculative in ambiguousRequirements since the plan doesn't specify module, function signature, or lifecycle placement. We infer from Example 2 (plan-feature.ts with __testables).
Fix 4: Based the test structure on the existing test file conventions from Example 2 (plan-feature-spec.plan.test.ts) — same import pattern, same ctx/state helpers, same __testables approach.
Fix 5: Removed dedicated applyPlanningState/getPlanningState/clearPlanningState tests. Added one lightweight regression guard that skips gracefully if those functions don't exist.
Fix 6 (scope): The 'review and update' requirement is addressed by aligning this test file with the conventions of the cited existing test file.
Fix 7 (out of scope): 'Unconfirmed product changes beyond the requested feature' is not a testable behavior — listed in ambiguousRequirements.
Fix 8 (clarified decisions): Section is explicitly '(none)' — nothing to test, listed in ambiguousRequirements.
Fix 9 (documented in repo-grounded terms): This is a meta-level criterion about the plan document, not a testable system behavior — listed in ambiguousRequirements.
